items.title: Link Creation and Bidirectional Integrity
items.description: Epic E-001: Core linking functionality ensuring all links are strictly bidirectional. Creating or deleting a link updates both directions atomically. URL normalization runs on write. Titles are mutable metadata; URLs are canonical identifiers.

items.title: Jump Palette Navigation
items.description: Epic E-002: Fast, typed navigation via command palette. Opens instantly with Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + K. Supports Vim-style navigation (j/k for up/down, gg/G for top/bottom, / for search, Enter to open, Esc to close). Modifier navigation with Cmd/Ctrl + j/k/h/l.

items.title: Context Sidebar Navigation and Reordering
items.description: Epic E-003: Persistent right-side sidebar showing related links for the current page. Opens with Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + \. Supports Vim navigation, search filtering, and keyboard-driven reordering that persists per page.

items.title: Local Cache and Offline Support
items.description: Epic E-004: Local cache via extension storage or IndexedDB drives UI responsiveness. Users can jump and link while offline. Pending changes are queued and synced when connectivity is restored. Cloud storage (Supabase) is the sync source of truth.

items.title: Global Inventory and Cleanup Tools
items.description: Epic E-005: Graph audit and cleanup interface. Browse all stored pages, remove relationships symmetrically, rename page titles, merge normalized duplicates, show orphans. Opens with Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + Y.

items.title: Link current page to another page via keyboard shortcut
items.description:
US-001: As a user, I can link the current page to another page via a keyboard shortcut.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given I am on a page
- When I press Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + L
- Then a modal opens allowing me to confirm the target URL and title

Parent Epic: E-001 Link Creation and Bidirectional Integrity

items.title: Saving a link creates two symmetric relationships
items.description:
US-002: As a user, saving a link creates two symmetric relationships.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given page A and page B
- When I save a link
- Then both A → B and B → A exist

Parent Epic: E-001 Link Creation and Bidirectional Integrity

items.title: Duplicate links are automatically de-duped
items.description:
US-003: As a user, duplicate links are automatically de-duped.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given a relationship already exists
- When I attempt to recreate it
- Then no duplicate is stored

Parent Epic: E-001 Link Creation and Bidirectional Integrity

items.title: Open jump palette to navigate links
items.description:
US-004: As a user, I can open a jump palette to navigate links.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given I am on a page
- When I press Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + K
- Then the Jump Palette opens instantly

Parent Epic: E-002 Jump Palette Navigation

items.title: Navigate palette using Vim keys
items.description:
US-005: As a user, I can navigate the palette using Vim keys.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given the palette is open
- When I press j or k
- Then selection moves accordingly

Parent Epic: E-002 Jump Palette Navigation

items.title: Use modifier Vim navigation in palette
items.description:
US-006: As a user, I can use modifier Vim navigation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given the palette is open
- When I press Cmd/Ctrl + j k h l
- Then selection moves down, up, first, or last respectively

Parent Epic: E-002 Jump Palette Navigation

items.title: Open persistent sidebar of related links
items.description:
US-007: As a user, I can open a persistent sidebar of related links.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given I am on a page
- When I press Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + \
- Then a right-side sidebar opens showing related links

Parent Epic: E-003 Context Sidebar Navigation and Reordering

items.title: Reorder related links using keyboard
items.description:
US-008: As a user, I can reorder related links using the keyboard.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given the sidebar is open
- When I enter reorder mode and move items
- Then the new order is persisted per page

Parent Epic: E-003 Context Sidebar Navigation and Reordering

items.title: Jump and link while offline
items.description:
US-009: As a user, I can jump and link while offline.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given I am offline
- When I open the palette or sidebar
- Then cached data is available

Parent Epic: E-004 Local Cache and Offline Support

items.title: Offline changes sync on reconnect
items.description:
US-010: As a user, offline changes sync on reconnect.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given pending local changes
- When connectivity is restored
- Then changes are synced to the cloud

Parent Epic: E-004 Local Cache and Offline Support

items.title: Browse all stored pages
items.description:
US-011: As a user, I can browse all stored pages.

Parent Epic: E-005 Global Inventory and Cleanup Tools

items.title: Remove relationships symmetrically
items.description:
US-012: As a user, I can remove relationships symmetrically.

Parent Epic: E-005 Global Inventory and Cleanup Tools

items.title: Rename page titles
items.description:
US-013: As a user, I can rename page titles.

Parent Epic: E-005 Global Inventory and Cleanup Tools

items.title: Merge normalized duplicates
items.description:
US-014: As a user, I can merge normalized duplicates.

Parent Epic: E-005 Global Inventory and Cleanup Tools

items.title: Global Inventory surface
items.description: Implement screen S-004 for the MVP: ship inventory.html + Preact UI that lists/searches all pages, exposes rename + symmetric relationship removal, and adds a duplicate merge workflow wired into the background/storage APIs.

items.title: Add ESLint flat config
items.description: `npm run lint` currently errors because no eslint.config.* exists. Add a flat config (or compatible setup) so linting works again and the Makefile/npm scripts can pass.
